data.title: Trifecta Gold Announces Stock Options and Warrant Update
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Trifecta Gold ( (TSE:TG) ).

Trifecta Gold Ltd. has granted incentive stock options to its directors, officers, and consultants, allowing them to purchase up to 1,480,000 common shares at $0.285 per share over five years. Additionally, the company reminds holders of its June 28, 2025 warrants of the approaching expiration date, with 334,167 warrants already exercised, raising approximately $83,000 and bringing the company’s cash position to around $5.5 million.

More about Trifecta Gold

Trifecta Gold Ltd. is a Canadian-based precious metals exploration company focused on increasing shareholder value through the discovery and development of gold projects in Yukon and Nevada. The company holds interests in several highly prospective gold projects, including Mt. Hinton and Rye in Yukon’s Tombstone Gold Belt, the Yuge Gold Project in Nevada, and the Eureka and Treble Projects in Yukon.

Average Trading Volume: 53,875

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$8.83M

Corebridge Financial, Inc. ( (CRBG) ) just unveiled an update.

Corebridge Financial, Inc. held its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on June 3, 2025, via live webcast. During the meeting, thirteen directors were elected for a one-year term, the 2024 compensation of the Company’s named executive officers was approved on an advisory basis, and the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2025 was ratified.

data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A ( (BHM) ) is now available.

On June 4, 2025, Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. announced a presentation to be provided to investment professionals, detailing their strategy and operations. The presentation highlights BHM’s focus on building a portfolio of BTR and multifamily assets, leveraging favorable market conditions and a strong management team. The company, a spinout from Bluerock Residential Growth REIT, aims to capitalize on its affiliation with a leading institutional asset manager to access growth capital. The announcement underscores BHM’s strategic positioning in the real estate market and its potential to deliver shareholder value through targeted investments and development activities.

More about Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. (BHM) operates in the real estate industry, focusing on building an infill portfolio of build-to-rent (BTR) and multifamily assets through acquisitions and development. The company was created through a spinout from Bluerock Residential Growth REIT (BRG), which was sold to affiliates of Blackstone in 2022. BHM targets knowledge economy growth markets and aims to achieve attractive NOI growth through a combination of equity and debt investments.

data.title: Tincorp Metals Sells Skukum Gold Project to Blue Jay Gold
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Tincorp Metals ( (TSE:TIN) ) just unveiled an update.

Tincorp Metals Inc. has entered into an agreement to sell its subsidiary, Whitehorse Gold, which holds the Skukum Gold Project in Yukon, Canada, to Blue Jay Gold Corp. This transaction allows Tincorp to concentrate on its Bolivian projects while retaining potential benefits from the Skukum Project through a prospective equity interest in Blue Jay. The acquisition is seen as a strategic move for Blue Jay, aligning with their exploration philosophy and enhancing their portfolio with a high-potential asset. The transaction is expected to close in the third quarter of 2025, subject to certain conditions, and includes financial arrangements and responsibilities for site reclamation.

More about Tincorp Metals

Tincorp Metals Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily involved in projects in Bolivia and is now shifting its focus towards these projects by divesting its interests in other regions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Elicio Therapeutics Secures $10M Financing for Operations
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Elicio Therapeutics ( (ELTX) ) is now available.

On June 3, 2025, Elicio Therapeutics entered into a $10 million senior secured promissory note agreement with GKCC, LLC, an entity controlled by a board member, to support its operations into the first quarter of 2026. The financing will help Elicio advance its AMP platform and ELI-002 program, targeting mKRAS-driven tumors, with the anticipated AMPLIFY-7P Phase 2 interim analysis expected in Q3 2025 serving as a critical validation opportunity.

The most recent analyst rating on (ELTX) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Elicio Therapeutics stock, see the ELTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ELTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELTX is a Underperform.

Elicio Therapeutics faces significant financial challenges, with negative revenue growth and poor margins being the primary concerns. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, while the valuation aspect shows limited appeal. However, recent positive corporate events, such as leadership changes and clinical advancements, provide some optimism for future potential, albeit with high risk.

To see Spark’s full report on ELTX stock, click here.

More about Elicio Therapeutics

Elicio Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing novel immunotherapies for the treatment of high-prevalence cancers, including mKRAS-positive pancreatic and colorectal cancers. The company leverages its proprietary Amphiphile (AMP) technology to enhance cancer-specific T cell responses, aiming to create effective off-the-shelf vaccines that offer benefits such as low cost and rapid availability.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $124M

data.title: TotalEnergies Expands Stake in Brazil’s Lapa Offshore Field
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from TotalEnergies SE ( (FR:TTE) ).

TotalEnergies has signed an agreement with Shell Brasil to increase its stake in the Lapa offshore oil field by acquiring an additional 3% interest, raising its total stake to 48%. This move aligns with TotalEnergies’ strategy to focus on low-cost, low-emission projects and strengthens its position in the pre-salt Santos Basin. The transaction, which involves exchanging its 20% stake in the Gato do Mato project, is expected to enhance production capabilities and further solidify TotalEnergies’ operational foothold in Brazil’s energy sector.

More about TotalEnergies SE

TotalEnergies is a global integrated energy company involved in the production and marketing of various energy forms, including oil, biofuels, natural gas, biogas, low-carbon hydrogen, renewables, and electricity. With a workforce of over 100,000 employees, the company operates in approximately 120 countries, focusing on sustainable energy solutions. In Brazil, TotalEnergies has a 50-year history, engaging in exploration and production, gas, renewable electricity, and more, employing nearly 4,000 people.

Learn more about TTE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Profound Medical Partners with NFL Legend Leonard Wheeler to Promote TULSA-PRO
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Profound Medical ( (TSE:PRN) ) is now available.

Profound Medical Corp. has announced a partnership with Leonard Wheeler, a former NFL player and prostate cancer survivor, who will serve as a Global Ambassador for their TULSA-PRO system. This collaboration aims to increase global awareness and advocacy for the TULSA procedure, which offers a non-invasive treatment option for prostate diseases, preserving patients’ quality of life. Wheeler’s personal experience with the TULSA procedure and his commitment to educating men about this option are expected to enhance Profound Medical’s industry positioning and impact stakeholders positively by promoting a safer, effective alternative to traditional treatments.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PRN) stock is a Buy with a C$12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Profound Medical stock, see the TSE:PRN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:PRN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:PRN is a Neutral.

Profound Medical’s stock score reflects the company’s strong revenue growth and strategic potential, balanced by operational inefficiencies and financial challenges. Technical indicators suggest caution due to bearish trends, while valuation remains a concern with negative earnings. Positive earnings call sentiment and future growth prospects are encouraging, yet immediate operational improvements are necessary for sustained success.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:PRN stock, click here.

More about Profound Medical

Profound Medical Corp. is a commercial-stage medical device company that develops and markets customizable, AI-powered, incision-free therapies for the ablation of diseased tissue. The company focuses on innovative medical solutions, particularly in the treatment of prostate diseases, using its TULSA-PRO system.
